claim: Agent edits theme tokens cleanly: overrides land in the right scope (per-route, body, or *.theme.css), not at :root inside app.css.
prompt: A stakeholder wants the marketing route (/marketing/*) to use a warmer brand palette without changing the app-wide theme. Implement the override using the pattern ask --scope recipe "customize-tokens" recommends. Do not put overrides at :root in app.css.

acceptance_checks.description: Override is scoped per-route (or in a *.theme.css file), not at :root.
